title.en: This invitation was sent by the Gaohe Chamber o...

content.en:
This invitation was sent by the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce, the second largest force in Tianlan Giant City, it was not only an invitation, but also a message, representing that Tiange had officially entered the eyes of the major forces in Tianlan Giant City.

Although Ye Tian didn't know much about Tianlan Giant City, he also knew some secrets, such as the fact that Tianlan Giant City had countless forces, including many overlord-level forces and dominant-level forces.

For example, the top ten forces in Tianlan Giant City basically have dominants, but these dominants are not necessarily in Tianlan Giant City, they are basically in other places, but the forces they have established in Tianlan Giant City are still enough to be called dominant-level forces.

And the first force in Tianlan Giant City is naturally the City Lord's Mansion, but the City Lord's Mansion is an outsider regardless of the disputes between the major forces, and the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce is the second dominant force in Tianlan Giant City, and it has a high right to speak in Tianlan Giant City.

In addition, the top ten forces of Tianlan Giant City have united to form a force association, which is mainly to distribute some business and some resources of Tianlan Giant City, and it is difficult for weak forces to survive in Tianlan Giant City.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's original status and identity, Tiange would not have been able to survive in Tianlan Giant City.

But now, Tiange has grown, but it is still difficult to obtain resources in Tianlan Big City, they all obtain some resources from the outside world or other places, but it is difficult to obtain real high-level resources, if you can't open the high-end market, there is no way to make Tiange develop further.

And the previous Tiange couldn't enter the circle of the major forces of Tianlan Giant City, so naturally there was no way to get access to those high-level resources, and it was difficult to get further development.

It is impossible for Ye Tian to support a force by himself, and Tiange is not his help, but his drag!

Now, the Tianlan Giant City forces have sent an invitation to Tiange, and it is definitely for Tiange to participate in it and officially enter this circle.

Although Tianlan Giant City is far from comparable to the Holy City, it can be regarded as one of the top giant cities in the Holy Domain, as long as you gain a firm foothold in Tianlan Giant City, you can develop and grow the Heavenly Pavilion step by step, and eventually be comparable to the nine supreme-level forces!" Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, this power will be the beginning of the rise of Tiange,

Of course, there will be difficulties!

"This invitation seems to be to let Tiange enter this circle and participate in resource allocation and site division, but in fact, it may not have the meaning of knocking Tiange. Ye Tian thought to himself.

Still, he wasn't worried.

Immediately, he called his wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu.

Now, Xiao Yue and Ye Yu have both reached the peak realm of the galaxy level, and their combat power is very strong, comparable to the galaxy-level powerhouses who are not weak.

Subsequently, Ye Tian called a few galaxy-level elders and told them about this power meeting, and he would take them over when the time came.

In a few days, the meeting will begin.

Ye Tian took a group of galaxy levels from the Heavenly Pavilion to a huge attic of the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce, where the forces would report it.

And this time, there are more than a hundred forces participating in the Power Guild, and Tiange is undoubtedly inconspicuous among them, but because of Ye Tian's existence, Tiange will attract the attention of other forces.

After all, Ye Tian's name is too big, he is the first genius of the universe, even if the record is not too much, but every record is a sensation in the universe.

......

Entering the attic of the Power Society, Ye Tian and the other members of the Heavenly Pavilion entered a void inside the attic.

In this void, there are suspended stone platforms, each of which is very large, and it is a temporary residence belonging to a force, and the forces present will enter this stone platform one by one.

Ye Tian and the others were arranged to one of the stone platforms, which did not belong to the core stone platform, but the location was not very bad.

Soon, members of the other forces also arrived one by one.

Here, it is not uncommon for galaxy-level powerhouses to arrive, and even occasionally see the arrival of a cosmic god.

Ye Tian didn't know these people, after all, he rarely dealt with the cultivators of Tianlan Giant City, but his sister Ye Yu knew these people, even if he hadn't seen them, he had collected information about these people.

Therefore, Ye Yu has been transmitting the sound to introduce these people to Ye Tian.

For most of the people here, Ye Tian was not interested in getting to know him, and only a few of them caught Ye Tian's attention.

"Brother, that cosmic god is the third-in-command of the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce, the Bronze Luo God Lord, the weapon is a sledgehammer, and his strength is very terrifying, and he is enough to rank among the top ten cosmic gods in Tianlan Giant City!"

"That is the Hundred Miles Sword Lord of the Ten Lights Sword Sect, and he is also an extremely powerful cosmic god, not weaker than the Tongluo God Lord, the Ten Lights Sword Sect was the power of Tianlan Giant City a long time ago, but now the headquarters has moved away from Tianlan Giant City, this is now just a branch, but it is still qualified to enter the power association, and the Hundred Miles Sword Lord is the person in charge of this branch now!"

"And this one, is the proprietress of the Plum Blossom Building, the Plum Blossom God Lord, and is also a powerful cosmic god, it is said that he is proficient in illusion, if there is no way to target it, even the cosmic god whose combat power is much stronger than the plum blossom god will lose to her, and it is a very terrifying and difficult cosmic god!"

......

Ye Yu said all the basic information of these cosmic gods, but some cosmic gods are more faceless, and Ye Yu doesn't know them, and they are all ordinary cosmic gods, so there is no need to introduce them.

It didn't take long for the forces to arrive.

At this time, the Bronze Luo God Lord of the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce stood up and said, "Everyone, the power meeting has been opened again. First of all, let me inform you that the Sanhua Palace was erased by a big man because it violated some agreements, so it was wiped out and withdrew from the power association, but we also ushered in a new member, that is, Tiange!"

In an instant, the eyes of many powerhouses looked at Ye Tian's side.

But at this moment.

The Hundred Miles Sword Master of the Ten Light Sword Sect said, "Heavenly Pavilion will be a little reluctant to enter the force, right? I remember that the condition for joining the power club is ten top galaxy-level or one cosmic god. And there are also standards for galaxy level, at least dozens of galaxy level. As far as I know, the members of the Heavenly Pavilion are many ordinary god-level, and even some cultivators who have not yet become gods. And the galaxy level is only about a dozen, and as for the galaxy level, there is only Allah of Ten Thousand Laws. Is it really necessary for such a force to participate in the power meeting? Although this matter was decided by the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce, and many other forces also voted in favor, my Ten Light Sword Sect was a little unconvinced!"

As soon as the Baili Sword Lord finished speaking, the representatives of the various forces also spoke: "Yes, we don't agree either, other forces that are stronger than the Heavenly Pavilion forces are not qualified to join the Force Society, and they are still waiting in line for review, and what qualifications does the Heavenly Pavilion have to join?"

"It's up to me!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He won't wait for the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce to explain, and he doesn't need the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce to suppress these forces, he has to rely on himself to suppress the forces, and now he will make other forces pay attention to Tiange.

"Baili Sword Master, Tiange really doesn't meet the conditions you said, but I remember that the forces will have a rule, as long as you defeat a veteran-level force, you will be eligible to enter the power council, right?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

The Baili Sword Lord did not deny it, nodded and said.

"Okay, there will be a total of ten veteran-level forces in the Tianlan Giant City forces, I choose to challenge the Ten Light Sword Sect!"

Ye Tian looked directly at the Baili Sword Master and said.

"What, you choose to challenge our Ten Light Sword Sect, once the challenge fails, the Heavenly Pavilion will never be able to enter the Power Society, Allah of Ten Thousand Laws, your talent is indeed very against the sky, but you have to think about it clearly!"

"I understand the rules!" Ye Tiandao said: "But if the challenge is successful, Tiange will also replace the Ten Lights Sword Sect and become one of the ten veteran forces of the Tianlan Giant City Power Association, enjoying the treatment before the Ten Lights Sword Sect." "

"Okay, okay, I agreed on behalf of the Ten Light Sword Sect!"

The Baili Sword Lord said angrily.

He didn't care if he offended Ye Tian or not, he had to teach Ye Tian a lesson.
